damasio1994.note: Approximation via standard skull + photographs. Earliest CT-informed reconstruction, entry below left zygomatic arch, exit through right frontal calvarium.

ratiu2004.note: Thin-slice CAT scan of actual exhumed skull + forensic analysis. Most anatomically precise trajectory based on physical skull measurements.

vanhorn2012.note: Tractography-based modeling with DTI connectivity analysis. Quantified white-matter disruption affecting ~4% of total cortical connections and ~11% of unique left-hemispheric inter-regional connections.
